text.title: Laravel Layered Architecture Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the layered Laravel architecture end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-form-request
step.action: Create `<Verb><Subject>Request` (FormRequest) with `rules()` + `authorize()`. Authorize via Policies; do not roll your own. Add a Pest test that hits the endpoint with missing/invalid fields and asserts 422.
step.decision-gate: If `request()->all()` is used downstream, BLOCK per `validated-only` rule.

step.name: add-service-with-transaction
step.action: Create `<Subject>Service` with constructor-injected dependencies. Add transactional methods using `DB::transaction(fn() => ...)`. Side effects (mail / queue) live after commit via `DB::afterCommit`.
step.output: Service class with explicit transaction boundary
step.decision-gate: If service touches `request()` or returns `JsonResponse`, BLOCK per `service-no-request-globals` + `jsonresource-from-controller-only` rules.

step.name: decide-repository
step.action: If a single Eloquent model backs the use-case AND no alternative implementation is on the roadmap, inject the model directly into the service. Add a repository only with an ADR justifying the abstraction.
step.output: Service injects Model OR Repository (with ADR)
step.decision-gate: If a Repository is introduced without justification, BLOCK per `repository-only-when-needed` rule.

step.name: add-json-resource
step.action: Create `<Subject>Resource` with explicit attribute list. Controllers return `new <Subject>Resource($model)` or `<Subject>Resource::collection($paginator)`.

step.name: write-feature-and-unit-tests
step.action: Pest feature tests cover happy + sad paths via HTTP. Service unit tests run without booting Laravel where possible (use `Container::bind` overrides + Mockery for repositories).
